name: ImprovedCreditScore L.L.C
description_short: ImprovedCreditScore L.L.C is a credit repair provider based in Dallas, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 128 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
ImprovedCreditScore L.L.C is a Dallas-based credit counseling and credit repair firm operating out of Preston Road in North Dallas. The company works with consumers who want to dispute inaccurate or damaging items on their credit reports, rebuild their financial profile, and develop longer-term habits that support a healthier credit score. Their extended operating hours — Monday through Saturday 9am to 9pm and Sunday 10am to 8pm — suggest a service model built around working adults who can't always take calls during a standard business day.

The company's core process appears to follow a structured four-step framework: an initial free credit review, a personalized strategy, active dispute or remediation work, and ongoing monitoring and guidance. They advertise no cost for the initial consultation, which is standard in the credit repair industry. Their Google rating of 5.0 from 128 reviews is notably strong, and the company uses client before-and-after testimonials prominently on its website. While independently verified results are not available, the volume and consistency of positive reviews suggests a meaningful base of satisfied clients.

Consumers should be aware of a few things before engaging any credit repair firm. Under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), companies cannot charge fees before services are rendered, must provide a written contract, and must give you a three-day right to cancel. ImprovedCreditScore's website does not disclose pricing publicly, which means you'll need to ask directly during the consultation. Always get the fee structure in writing and compare it against what nonprofit credit counseling agencies offer, some of which provide dispute guidance at low or no cost.

On balance, ImprovedCreditScore presents as a professionally operated local firm with a strong customer satisfaction track record for a Dallas-area provider. The 5.0 rating across 128 reviews is harder to maintain than a 5.0 on a handful of reviews, which adds modest credibility. The main unknowns are pricing and the specific dispute methodologies used — consumers should ask detailed questions about what actions the company will actually take on their behalf and what happens if disputes are unsuccessful.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 5.0 Google rating across 128 reviews — unusually strong for a credit repair firm
Free initial credit review with no obligation to enroll
Extended hours (including Sundays) accommodate working clients
Structured four-step process provides a clear roadmap for clients
Local Dallas office with a physical address — not a faceless online-only operation
Established digital presence with video testimonials offering social proof
cons: Pricing is not disclosed on the website — must request during consultation
No nonprofit certification or HUD-approved counseling designation found
As a for-profit credit repair firm, services overlap with what consumers can legally do themselves for free
Limited independent third-party verification of claimed client results
No information about whether staff hold recognized certifications (e.g., NFCC, AFCC)
best_for: Consumers in Dallas, Texas looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: ImprovedCreditScore L.L.C is best suited for Dallas-area consumers who have inaccurate or disputable negative items on their credit reports and want hands-on local support navigating the dispute process. The main caveat is that pricing is opaque upfront, and anyone without clear errors on their report may get more value from a free nonprofit credit counselor.
services: Free initial credit report review and consultation
Credit bureau dispute filing (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Personalized credit improvement strategy and roadmap
Ongoing credit monitoring and score tracking
Creditor negotiation and goodwill letter support
Collections account dispute and validation requests
Credit rebuilding advice (secured cards, credit-builder loans)
Financial literacy coaching and habit-building support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
